mapper.select: select i.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name from inventory i left join goods g on i.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on i.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on i.owner_id=o.owner_id where g.status=1 order by i.inventory_id desc

select i.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name from inventory i left join goods g on i.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on i.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on i.owner_id=o.owner_id where i.goods_id=#{goodsId} and i.warehouse_id=#{warehouseId} and i.owner_id=#{ownerId} limit 1
mapper.update: update inventory set quantity=quantity+#{quantity}, update_time=now() where goods_id=#{goodsId} and warehouse_id=#{warehouseId} and owner_id=#{ownerId}
mapper.insert: insert into inventory (goods_id, warehouse_id, owner_id, quantity, warning_quantity) values (#{goodsId}, #{warehouseId}, #{ownerId}, #{quantity}, #{warningQuantity})
mapper.select: select i.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name from inventory i left join goods g on i.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on i.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on i.owner_id=o.owner_id where i.quantity <= i.warning_quantity and g.status=1 order by i.quantity asc

select i.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name from inventory i left join goods g on i.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on i.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on i.owner_id=o.owner_id where i.warehouse_id=#{warehouseId} order by i.inventory_id desc

select i.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name from inventory i left join goods g on i.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on i.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on i.owner_id=o.owner_id where i.owner_id=#{ownerId} order by i.inventory_id desc
